zh.lifeSummary: Gerbert De Percy是Ernald II de Percy和Mrs Ernald II de Percy的兒子，於1105年出生在英國多瑟特布利波特。他於1127年與Maud de Arundel Heiress of Poorstock在英國英格蘭多瑟特普斯東可 利波迪結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Gerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Gerbert De Percy was born in 1105, in Bridport, Dorset, England as the son of Ernald II de Percy and Mrs Ernald II de Percy. He married Maud de Arundel Heiress of Poorstock in 1127, in Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1179, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Gerbert De Percy est né en 1105, à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, fils d’Ernald II de Percy et Mrs Ernald II de Percy. Il a épousé Maud de Arundel Heiress of Poorstock en 1127, à Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1179, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Gerbert De Percy(은)는 1105년 영국 도르세트 브리드포트에서 Ernald II de Percy(와)과 Mrs Ernald II de Percy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1127년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포르스톡 리버티에서 Maud de Arundel Heiress of Poorstock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Gerbert De Percy родился в 1105 г. в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия. Его родителей звали Ernald II de Percy и Mrs Ernald II de Percy. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Arundel Heiress of Poorstock в 1127 г. в местности пурстокк либирти, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1179 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.
